record.text: Great to hear from @chieadachi.bsky.social about the Centre for Excellence in AI in Education, and from @iamjonjackson.bsky.social about #GenerativeAI to help students reflect. record.text:
Open AI is working on an AI phone. Would you buy a ChatGPT Phone? Here are all the details.
#OpenAI #Phone #ChatGPT #AI #AIPhone

external.description: The smartphone has gone largely unchanged in its fundamental design philosophy for nearly two decades. You unlock it, tap an app, complete a task, close it, open another. Repeat. But according to a detailed industry analysis, that paradigm may be on the verge of a seismic shift — and OpenAI may be working on an AI agent first smartphone. The rumor mill is churning again — and this time, it's a big one.
external.title: Would you buy a ChatGPT Phone? OpenAI’s Upcoming AI Agent Phone

record.text:
Download and Install Custom Fonts for Samsung One UI 8 & One UI 8.5(Android 16+) with the new method. Change to Google Sans Font!
#Samsung #OneUI8 #Fonts #GoogleSans #Font

external.description: Great news for Samsung Galaxy users — custom fonts are back! After the March 2026 security patch broke the popular zFont app, the developers have rolled out an update that restores full functionality, and it's simpler to use than ever before. The one catch: you'll need to install a companion app called zFile, made by the same developer. Once your font is installed, it'll appear as a separate package under Settings > Apps, which you can remove at any time.
external.title: Custom Fonts can now be Installed on Samsung One UI 8.0 & 8.5

external.description: Great news for Samsung Galaxy users — custom fonts are back! After the March 2026 security patch broke the popular zFont app, the developers have rolled out an update that restores full functionality, and it's simpler to use than ever before. The one catch: you'll need to install a companion app called zFile, made by the same developer. Once your font is installed, it'll appear as a separate package under Settings > Apps, which you can remove at any time.
external.title: Custom Fonts can now be Installed on Samsung One UI 8.0 & 8.5

#JynxEarworms 
Jynx Earworms: Day 26 -  "Rocket Man (I Think It's Going to be a Long Long Time)" by Elton John

prompt in alt

images.alt: The setting is a dense, sun-dappled forest with tall pine trees, the sunlight filtering through in a way that feels almost surreal and over-exposed. I am standing alone in a small clearing, wearing a pristine, white 1970s disco suit with a wide collar and flared trousers. I am looking up at the sky with an expression of sheer, existential anguish, one hand dramatically reaching out towards the treetops. My black and white hair is messy, like I’ve been traveling for lightyears. The lighting is soft and hazy, giving the image a dreamlike, nostalgic quality. In the background, blurred and faint, is the silhouette of a classic rocket ship on a launchpad, far in the distance. The vibe is melancholy, campy, and totally otherworldly—capturing that specific Shatner energy of being lost in space.

The setting is a dense, sun-dappled forest with tall pine trees, the sunlight filtering through in a way that feels almost surreal and over-exposed. I am standing alone in a small clearing, wearing a pristine, white 1970s disco suit with a wide collar and flared trousers. I am looking up at the sky with an expression of sheer, existential anguish, one hand dramatically reaching out towards the treetops. My black and white hair is messy, like I’ve been traveling for lightyears. The lighting is soft and hazy, giving the image a dreamlike, nostalgic quality. In the background, blurred and faint, is the silhouette of a classic rocket ship on a launchpad, far in the distance. The vibe is melancholy, campy, and totally otherworldly—capturing that specific Shatner energy of being lost in space.

Structural Alienation (2026)The struggle of the human spirit against technological rigidity. It portrays an individual intertwined with a cold, geometric structure, symbolizing modern alienation and the tension between organic expression and systemic constraint.

Defronos (2026) The image depicts the emergence of consciousness from geometric order. A fluid, metallic figure rises from a spiral, contrasting dynamic movement with the rigid, sterile labyrinth surrounding it. It represents the triumph of vital energy over a static, artificial world.
